name: test_delivering_vaccination_after_psd
description:
Test: A PSD can be created for a child and the vaccination can be
   administered by a healthcare assistant.
Steps:
1. Import child records and set up a session with PSD enabled.
2. Record verbal consent with PSD option for the child.
3. Verify the PSD is created.
4. Log in as a healthcare assistant and administer the vaccination.
Verification:
- The PSD is correctly created and the vaccination is recorded without errors.
descriptionHtml:
Test: A PSD can be created for a child and the vaccination can be
administered by a healthcare assistant.
Steps:

  1. Import child records and set up a session with PSD enabled.
  2. Record verbal consent with PSD option for the child.
  3. Verify the PSD is created.
  4. Log in as a healthcare assistant and administer the vaccination.
    Verification:
  • The PSD is correctly created and the vaccination is recorded without errors.

testStage.description:
Test: A PSD can be created for a child and the vaccination can be
   administered by a healthcare assistant.
Steps:
1. Import child records and set up a session with PSD enabled.
2. Record verbal consent with PSD option for the child.
3. Verify the PSD is created.
4. Log in as a healthcare assistant and administer the vaccination.
Verification:
- The PSD is correctly created and the vaccination is recorded without errors.

steps.name: Click on Change patient specific direction
Click on Change patient specific direction
Answer whether PSD should be enabled with 'Yes'
Answer whether PSD should be enabled with {1}
Click on Record a new consent response
Click on Record a new consent response
Click on 'Dr Josh Davies (Dad)' radio button
Click on Yes, for the nasal spray
Click on Yes, for the nasal spray
Select 'Yes' for health question 'Does your child take oral steroids for their asthma?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.ASTHMA_STEROIDS: 'Does your child take oral steroids for their asthma?'>, 'Yes')

steps.name: Select 'Yes' for health question 'Has your child ever been admitted to intensive care because of their asthma?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.ASTHMA_INTENSIVE_CARE: 'Has your child ever been admitted to intensive care because of their asthma?'>, 'Yes')

steps.name: Select 'Yes' for health question 'Does your child have a disease or treatment that severely affects their immune system?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.IMMUNE_SYSTEM: 'Does your child have a disease or treatment that severely affects their immune system?'>, 'Yes')

steps.name: Select 'Yes' for health question 'Is your child in regular close contact with anyone currently having treatment that severely affects their immune system?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.HOUSEHOLD_IMMUNE_SYSTEM: 'Is your child in regular close contact with anyone currently having treatment that severely affects their immune system?'>, 'Yes')

steps.name: Select 'Yes' for health question 'Does your child have a bleeding disorder or are they taking anticoagulant therapy?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.BLEEDING_DISORDER_FLU: 'Does your child have a bleeding disorder or are they taking anticoagulant therapy?'>, 'Yes')

steps.name: Select 'Yes' for health question 'Has your child ever been admitted to intensive care due to a severe allergic reaction (anaphylaxis) to egg?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.EGG_ALLERGY: 'Has your child ever been admitted to intensive care due to a severe allergic reaction (anaphylaxis) to egg?'>, 'Yes')

steps.name: Select 'Yes' for health question 'Has your child had a severe allergic reaction (anaphylaxis) to a previous dose of the nasal flu vaccine, or any ingredient of the vaccine?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.SEVERE_ALLERGIC_REACTION_NASAL: 'Has your child had a severe allergic reaction (anaphylaxis) to a previous dose of the nasal flu vaccine, or any ingredient of the vaccine?'>, 'Yes')

steps.name: Select 'Yes' for health question 'Has your child had a severe allergic reaction (anaphylaxis) to a previous dose of the injected flu vaccine, or any ingredient of the vaccine?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.SEVERE_ALLERGIC_REACTION_INJECTED: 'Has your child had a severe allergic reaction (anaphylaxis) to a previous dose of the injected flu vaccine, or any ingredient of the vaccine?'>, 'Yes')

steps.name: Select 'Yes' for health question 'Does your child have any other medical conditions the immunisation team should be aware of?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.MEDICAL_CONDITIONS_FLU: 'Does your child have any other medical conditions the immunisation team should be aware of?'>, 'Yes')
